title: Russian Peppery Dumplings
description: A hearty and comforting Russian-inspired dish featuring fluffy dumplings in a rich peppery sauce served with a side of warm milk.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, eggs, and water to form the dumpling dough.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces and roll each into a ball.
On a lightly floured surface, roll out each ball into a thin circle.
In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the freshly ground black pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the rolled dumplings to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings with warm milk and enjoy!
